acceptance_criteria.description: TypeScript compiles with no errors including Ring 1 and Ring 2 prompt templates
Ring 1 prompt templates cover all four semantic checks with correct structure
acceptance_criteria.rubric: Verify: (1) ring1.ts exports four functions for R1-S01 (terminology consistency), R1-S02 (requirement atomicity), R1-S03 (cross-spec consistency), R1-S04 (decomposition guidance coverage). (2) Each function accepts document content as parameters and returns a complete prompt string. (3) Each prompt asks exactly one question and specifies structured JSON output with check, verdict, and issues fields. (4) R1-S03 prompt handles the conditional case of empty related_specs. (5) Functions are pure — no LLM calls, no I/O. PASS if all five hold. FAIL otherwise.

acceptance_criteria.description: Ring 2 prompt templates cover all three quality rubrics with correct structure
acceptance_criteria.rubric: Verify: (1) ring2.ts exports three functions for R2-S01 (decomposition readiness), R2-S02 (requirement precision), R2-S03 (completeness). (2) Each function accepts document content as parameters and returns a complete prompt string. (3) Each prompt specifies structured JSON output with check, dimension, verdict, evidence, and summary fields. (4) Functions are pure — no LLM calls, no I/O. PASS if all four hold. FAIL otherwise.
